subcodes.title: Ziyarat-Namiy-i-Asiyyih Khanum
subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Time and again have sorrows overtaken the people of Bahá who have believed in God [3.5s]... ...Verily, once again hath occurred that which hath saddened the people of Bahá, who have believed in God
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم قد جاء کره بعد اخری ما اخذت به الاحزان اهل البهاء الذین آمنوا بالله
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
